query: SELECT id, program, location, dayOfWeek, startTime, endTime, instructor, isActive FROM classSchedule WHERE isActive = 1 ORDER BY program, FIELD(dayOfWeek, 'Monday','Tuesday','Wednesday','Thursday','Friday','Saturday','Sunday'), startTime;
